positive: A vibrant, symmetrical celestial map design composed of intricate geometric mandalas and floating cosmic elements. The main subject features stylized constellations forming a stylized ouroboros pattern around a central, glowing nebula. Use deep midnight blues, shimmering electric purples, cosmic teal, and brilliant gold accents. The style must be highly stylized, vector-art influenced, with crisp lines and clean, solid silhouettes. Composition must be perfectly balanced and centered, suitable for all over printing on apparel. Studio quality lighting, high contrast, clean edges, cosmic dust texture, scientific illustration meets ethereal abstract art.
